comments.text: Examples: Let $u=17952448643078$ and $v=17952448643091$, so for $v-u=13$ there is a solution where the largest prime divisor of the product, $4237033$, has multiplicity 2 in the factorisation. $u=9419732244806055=211193^3-2$ and $v=9419732244806060$ does the job for $v-u=5$ and multiplicity $3$
